g.text: At the adversarial frontier of AI, robotics, and cybersecurity —
I teach machines how to see, think, and deceive,
then I architect the systems to defend against them.
I operate where AI, cybersecurity, and robotics collide. My work
is a meditation on perception — coding machines to interpret the
world while questioning the authenticity of the digital reflection.
Fascinated by the boundary between simulation and understanding —
the moment an algorithm stops imitating intelligence and starts
